类 MediaType

java.lang.Object
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.MediaType
所有已实现的接口:
Serializable
public class MediaType extends Object implements Serializable
copied from springframework
as defined in the HTTP specification.
从以下版本开始:
3.0
另请参阅:
  • HTTP 1.1: Semantics and Content, section 3.1.1.1
